allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement advanced hierarchical layout optimization algorithm

Major features:
- Adaptive multi-tier algorithm selection based on node complexity
  - Tier 0: Exhaustive enumeration for 1-2 children
  - Tier 1: Multi-strategy MaxRects (30 combinations) for 3-8 children
  - Tier 2: Beam search (K=12) for 9-15 children
  - Tier 3: Genetic algorithm (pop=25, gen=60) for 16+ children

- Two-pass sizing with predictive width normalization
  - Pass 1: Natural sizing to determine max root width
  - Pass 2: Re-sizing with predicted width awareness
  - Cost function accounts for post-normalization whitespace

- MaxRects 2D bin packing implementation
  - 5 placement heuristics: BSSF, BLSF, BAF, BL, CP
  - 6 sort strategies: area, height, width, perimeter, aspect ratios
  - Optimal space utilization with minimal whitespace

- Enhanced cost function
  - Area minimization
  - Whitespace penalty (0.4 weight in compact mode)
  - Aspect ratio targeting (ISO √2 ratio)
  - Predictive final width optimization for root nodes

- Visual improvements
  - 60px page margin around background layer
  - Optimized horizontal/vertical layout selection for 2-child nodes
  - Proper root width normalization handling

Performance: <2 seconds for typical hierarchies, deterministic output

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
